limitations: ai_investment_intensity: No dollar amounts, GPU counts, or quantified capex figures for AI/datacenter investment appear in the excerpts; named infrastructure (Azure, datacenters, GPUs) and explicit cost acknowledgments support a score of 3 but not 4 or 5.

ai_narrative_concreteness: Multiple named deployed products (Copilot, Azure AI Foundry, Nuance, GitHub Copilot) described with operational detail, but no quantified business results (revenue contribution, user counts, productivity metrics) appear in these excerpts, capping score at 4.
capex_mentions: No specific dollar or capacity figures tied to AI/compute investment were found in the provided excerpts.
